chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5811 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 17.03.2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for the petitioner Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondent Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel interim restraint has been ordered including arrest of the petitioner vide order dated 19.11.2020. He states that this petition may be converted into a petition for protective bail and the said concession be extended to the petitioner against the security already furnished. Request is not opposed on behalf of the respective learned counsel for respondents. Therefore, this petition is converted as sought. In view hereof, this petition is duly converted into protective bail application and the petitioner / applicant is admitted to protective bail from the date hereof till end of Court hours on 26.03.2025 or upon surrender of the applicant before the trial Court, whichever is earlier, subject to solvent surety already submitted to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This petition is disposed of. Judge Judge Amjad
